name: @langchain/langgraph-integration
description: Integration tests: JS graphs running on the real managed langgraph-api server (ported from langgraph-api/api/langgraph_api/js/tests).

scripts.build: cd graphs && uv run langgraph build --no-pull -c langgraph.json --tag langgraphjs-tests-api
scripts.int: pnpm configure && pnpm build && pnpm up && (pnpm test; ec=$?; pnpm down; exit $ec)
